graph_edge_id.description: Stable short identifier for the composite internal graph edge.

parent_unit_id.description: Primary key of the parent composite execution unit.

child_ref_type.description: Normalized target reference type of the child call. Prefer unit, fall back to public_api, and use primitive_symbol only as the last resort.

child_ref.description: Target reference reached by this graph edge. Use unit_id when child_ref_type is unit.

call_order.description: Stable ordering index of this child call under the same parent and condition branch.

condition.description: Optional textual condition describing when this child call is taken.

via_symbol.description: Optional symbol name observed at the call site inside the parent implementation.

via_path.description: Optional source file path that provides the graph edge evidence.
